steps.title: Enter two days of data
steps.content: At birth, $x=0$ and the calf weighs $226$ pounds. After $1$ day, it has gained $3$ pounds, so the weight is $229$ pounds. Put $(0,226)$ and $(1,229)$ in Desmos.

steps.title: Run linear regression
steps.content: Use $y_1 \sim mx_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=3$ and $b=226$, so the model is $y=3x+226$, equivalent to $y=226+3x$.

steps.title: Eliminate the other choices
steps.content: Choice A matches the regression. Choice B has the wrong sign because the calf gains weight. Choice C swaps the starting value and daily gain. Choice D starts at $3$ and decreases by $226$ per day. Choice A is correct.
